---
format:
  revealjs:
    title-slide-attributes:
      data-visibility: hidden 
    theme: [default, title_mc.scss]
    margin: 0.05
    slide-number: true
    transition: slide
    navigation-mode: vertical
    width: 1280
    height: 720
    embed-resources: true 
    self-contained: true
    html-math-method: 
      method: mathjax
      url: "mathjax/tex-chtml.js"
    controls: false
mainfont: "Cambria Math"
---

```{=html}
<section class="title-slide">

  <div class="header-band">
    <div class="logo-box">
      <img src="angrau_logo.jpeg" alt="ANGRAU Logo">
    </div>
    <div class="inst-block">
      <div class="university-name">
        Acharya N.G. Ranga Agricultural University
      </div>
      <div class="college-name">
        Agricultural College, Bapatla
      </div>
      <div class="dept-name">
        Department of Statistics and Computer Applications
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="mid-content">
    <div class="course-label">
      AECO 605 Operations Research (2+1)
    </div>
    <div class="main-title">
      Monte Carlo Simulation Methods
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="footer-band">
    <div class="presenter-block">
      <span class="role-label">Presented by</span>
      <span class="person-name">Krupesh S</span>
      <span class="person-detail">(BAD/2025-25)</span>
      <span class="person-detail">I Ph.D.(Ag.) Agricultural Statistics</span>
    </div>
    <div class="incharge-block">
      <span class="role-label">Course In-charge</span>
      <span class="person-name">Dr. K. Suseela</span>
      <span class="person-detail">Professor and Head</span>
      <span class="person-detail">(Agricultural Economics)</span>
    </div>
  </div>

</section>
```

# Introduction

## Steps in Sound Simulation Study
```{=html}
<iframe src="simulation_flowchart.html"
        width="1280" height="720"
        style="border:none; display:block; margin:0 auto;"
        scrolling="no">
</iframe>
```
